ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Construction_Start__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Actual_Completion__c)), Actual_Completion__c < Construction_Start__c ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Construction_Start__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Expected_Completion__c)), Expected_Completion__c < Construction_Start__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please check the dates. Completion dates must be after the Construction Start Date, and Actual Completion cannot be before Expected Completion.
